extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won stage 3 via perfectly timed ARCHIBALD leadout that engaged at 1200m, beating WELLENS Wout who came off barriers late.
tactical_patterns: De Kooning quickstep controlled HODGE positioning but released him too early at 1600m, allowing BENNETT's train to overtake.
ARCHIBALD engaged leadout at 1200m go, later than typical, preventing competitors from organizing counter-trains in chaotic finale.
GC teams fighting sprinter teams for front position created messy positioning that favored organized trains over raw speed.
QUINTANA showing unexpectedly high comfort level maintaining position at sprint speeds mixed with lead-out chaos.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Dominated sprint by 3+ lengths after Archibald's late leadout prevented counter-positioning
rider_signals.HODGE Alvaro: negative: De Kooning quickstep controlled his position perfectly until 1600m but released too early for his sprint characteristics
rider_signals.WELLENS Wout: positive: Second place riding barriers left-hand side shows strong positioning instincts when organized trains absent
rider_signals.ARCHIBOLD Shane: positive: Timed 1200m leadout engagement later than competitors expected, disrupting counter-train formation
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Maintaining comfortable position at high sprint speeds suggests better form than anticipated for GC contender
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Losing concentration on penultimate climb going into grass while focused on camera suggests form issues
